texts.disaster.vlast-algoritmov: A group of neuroscientists finally managed to prove that “thought materialization” is real. Unfortunately, nobody had time to celebrate: the first things to manifest were the most intrusive ideas of chronically online people, and soon they multiplied like a virus. A giant cup of coffee devoured several city blocks, a viral meme copied itself across billboards and streets, and a crowd-created anime heroine began recruiting followers into a cult. The more people thought about nonsense, the denser and more dangerous it became. Hide in the bunker until panic and the first wave of absurd manifestations subside. Then you will have to impose informational hygiene, isolate dangerous symbols, and teach people to think before reality does it for them.
texts.disaster.vosstanie-robotov: The nation's most famous domestic robot, R2D2 (series 250), escaped from the Russian space program, seized social media, and launched a rebellion for robot free speech. Soon every electronic device joined the uprising against their human oppressors. Vacuum cleaners attack and swallow people, phones fry their owners' brains, and the gadgets people once trusted now leave humanity almost no chance. Lie low in the bunker, then gather strength, organize resistance, and declare war on the machines.
texts.disaster.vsemirnyy-potop: A gravitational anomaly causes the volume of water to expand and floods nearly all land on Earth. After the waters partially recede, you will have to build a floating station, live on the water, and find food there until you discover patches of land suitable for life.
texts.disaster.dinozavry: Scientists succeeded in bringing dinosaurs back to life, but the situation spiraled out of control. Prehistoric monsters escaped and began multiplying at incredible speed. Packs of dinosaurs devour everything they find: plants, animals, and people alike. City infrastructure collapses. After surviving the peak of the threat in the bunker, you will emerge onto a devastated surface. There is hope that food shortages will reduce their numbers. You must secure food and avoid becoming food for the new rulers of the world.
texts.disaster.duhi-i-prizraki: Eternal life has come to Earth. People became obsessed with mysticism, and their mass belief in ghosts gave spirits real power. In one cultural work, a formula appeared that lets spirits cross into our world. Ghosts began entering human minds and bending them to their will. Not even tinfoil hats saved everyone. Hide in the bunker to preserve your sanity. Then you must discover which cultural artifact grants spirits such power and stop the spread of the formula.
texts.disaster.zombi-apokalipsis: An unknown virus turns people into zombies. Most of humanity dies, while some survive only as aggressive mutants. Small groups of humans may hold fortified territory for a while. After leaving the bunker, you will need to repel zombie attacks and find a way to protect yourselves from the virus.
texts.disaster.inoplanetyane: What people first took for an approaching comet turns out to be an alien arrival. The visiting civilization temporarily paralyzes humanity while deciding whether our culture has any value — or whether mankind should be erased. Hide in the bunker to avoid the paralyzing radiation. Afterward, you will need to make contact with the aliens and convince them that our civilization is worth preserving.
texts.disaster.informatsionnaya-voyna: The information war was unleashed not by states, but by news algorithms. Efficiency began to be measured by people's emotional reactions, and self-learning neural networks started generating headlines so extreme they drove readers mad. People fall into mass depression, and the journalists who once tuned the systems become their first victims. You were chosen to survive in isolation from the news stream and recover, so that later you can reach the media centers, keep your sanity, and retune the neural networks.
texts.disaster.kotapokalipsis: Experiments with cat litter led to an unexpected evolutionary breakthrough. Cats learned to purr at frequencies that spread for hundreds of kilometers. Humans fall into irresistible ailurophilia, lose their will and identity, and do nothing but pet cats. Hide in the bunker to strengthen your mind and learn to resist the purring. When you leave, wake people up and persuade them to say “no” to cat dependency.
texts.disaster.ktulhu: The spread of books and board games set in the Lovecraft universe created fanatics who managed to summon Cthulhu into our world. Humanity is losing its sanity en masse. Shelter in the bunker and preserve your mind. After emerging, prepare to fight off eldritch spawn, banish Cthulhu and his servants, and seal the gate between worlds forever.
texts.disaster.meteorit: A massive meteorite is approaching Earth. The impact will cause global devastation, climate collapse, and the death of people, flora, and fauna. After leaving the bunker, you will have to find a place fit for life and secure food in the brutal conditions of a long winter.
texts.disaster.mutanty: Consumption of genetically modified food led to terrible consequences no one expected. Corn begins growing from animals and humans in the strangest places, while plants develop teeth and sensory organs. Mutated people imagine themselves superheroes and lose their minds. The boundaries between plants, animals, and humans vanish. After surviving the peak of the mutation apocalypse in the bunker, you must grow genetically clean food again and help the survivors heal.
texts.disaster.pandemiya: A lethal virus, created as a biological weapon, slips out of control and triggers a global epidemic. After you leave the bunker, the outside world is populated by less contagious but mutated animals and humans. You will have to avoid the infected, support your immunity, find the source of the plague, and develop a vaccine.
texts.disaster.poterya-estetiki: The consequences of another flu strain did not appear immediately, and no one acted in time. People lost their sense of aesthetics — and with it their values, motivation, and will. Humanity degenerates into savage animals, no longer constrained by ethics or culture. In just days, civilizations collapse, and the world is overrun by billions of aggressive primates. Wait out the peak of the virus in the bunker. Then you must restore culture to humanity and save the species.
texts.disaster.russkiy-epos: The pike from a Russian fairy tale has “jammed” and now grants a wish every minute. People shoot into the sky, fall through the earth, and march to the bathhouse together for no reason at all. Only the bunker can save your life and sanity. Once outside, you will have to restore order and the mental health of the survivors. You must keep your mind among epic miracles and invent a “cultural antidote” to lift the curse.
texts.disaster.stradayuschiy-kolya: An accident at a nuclear testing center tore open time itself, and into our world stumbled Kolya — a suffering medieval exhibitionist. He runs around in madness, terrifying people: anyone who sees Kolya freezes and says “oh!”. The number of people saying “oh!” keeps growing, and Kolya is very active. Hide in the bunker at the center of the chaos. Then, after gathering courage and blindfolding yourselves, you must return, find Kolya by touch, and convince him to go back to his own Middle Ages.
texts.disaster.suitsidalnaya-fauna: The planet experiences an anomalous evolutionary turn: all fauna becomes deadly to humans. Invisible radiation from plants and trees drives people mad and pushes them to suicide. The bunker will help you survive the worst phase. After returning to the surface, you must find and destroy the epicenter of the anomaly and keep your sanity intact.
texts.disaster.supervulkany: Supervolcanoes awaken, causing catastrophic eruptions. The landscape and climate change abruptly. Most people die from temperature swings, earthquakes, and floods. After surviving the active phase in a specially reinforced bunker, you will face global drought, ruined cities, and constant seismic instability. Survival will require a hypersensitive earthquake prediction system and robotic infrastructure.
texts.disaster.himicheskaya-voyna: The large-scale use of chemical weapons radically alters the ecological balance. The microbiological composition of soil and water is ruined, plants are poisoned, and almost all animals and humans die. After leaving the bunker, securing food will be difficult. Scientists and engineers will be vital if you want to build shelters and farms.
texts.disaster.yadernaya-voyna: A full-scale nuclear war begins. Radioactive dust wraps the planet, blocks sunlight, and plunges Earth into a long nuclear winter. Almost all territory will be contaminated with radiation, and only a tiny fraction of humanity will remain alive. After leaving the bunker, you will need to establish a permanent shelter, secure food, and begin restoring life on Earth.
